channel.title: STM on Kevin Y. Lin
channel.description: Recent content in STM on Kevin Y. Lin

item.title: Paper Summary: Quantum-limit Chern Topological Magnetism in TbMn6Sn6
item.description: A structured reading note on quantum-limit Chern topological magnetism in TbMn6Sn6, focusing on Dirac fermions, Chern gaps, edge states, and Berry-curvature transport.
